content: Tauri 2.0 requires beforeDevCommand, beforeBuildCommand, devUrl:http://localhost:3000, frontendDist:../out in tauri.conf.json. Android build: pnpm tauri android dev / pnpm tauri android build. Tauri WebView does not enforce CORS by default - frontend can call any origin. assetPrefix may need to be set for dev mode. Static export is mandatory - no server-based Next.js features work.
